arts.ttl: Lazio dreaming big as they go to Monza
arts.sum: After the first 11 matches of Serie A in 2024, Monza were fifth with 20 points, earned from six wins and two draws (3L), behind only Inter, Milan, Roma, and Bologna. Monza have never won any of their nine Serie A encounters with the two Roman clubs, with a record of four draws, including the two most recent at U-Power Stadium, and five defeats.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Monza v Lazio: Match Preview
arts.sum: The U-Power Stadium is set to host an intriguing Serie A clash on Sunday as struggling Monza welcome high-flying Lazio. With contrasting form and ambitions, this match could prove pivotal for both sides as the season approaches its midway point. Lazio enter this fixture in scintillating form, having won their last five matches across all competitions. Their recent run of three consecutive Serie A victories has propelled them to 6th place, just three points off the summit. Marco Baroni’s men have been particularly prolific, netting 10 goals in their last three league outings.
